description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by a fenced yard featuring several mature trees and green lawns. The exterior walls are primarily light gray with some darker accents, and the structure includes large rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The front of the house features a driveway with a parked car, a small porch area, and a prominent entryway partially shaded by a tree. The backyard includes a pergola structure and additional green space, while the side yard is enclosed by a combination of wooden and white fencing. The house appears to have multiple outdoor living areas, including a rooftop terrace and a covered patio. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on open, functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced yard with trees and green lawns. Features include a driveway, rooftop terrace, and multiple outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entryway, porch, and a car parked in front, with trees and lawn visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long white and wooden fence, pergola structure, and a tree in the yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, green lawn, pergola, and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, rooftop terrace, and more trees within the fenced yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a shaded area partially covered by a tree, featuring a modern door and minimal decorative elements.
